'''''Vortext'' 9''' was a roleplaying magazine from Summer of [[1993]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an article for the [[West End Games]] [[Star Wars Miniatures]] system. The article was called "[[Shootout at Landing Pad 94]]" and was written by [[Ted Arlauskas]] with help from [[Chuck Turnitsa]].
